entries.definition:
ح z-ḥ-z-ḥ to budge, to dislodge, to shift, to push away. This root can be regarded as a further derivative of the root ز/ح/ح z-ḥ-ḥ. Of this root, زُحْزِحَ zuhziḥa and مُزَحْزِح muzahziḥ occur once each in the Qur’an.
زُحْزِحَ zuhziḥa [pass. v.] moved away, shifted away (3:185) فَمَنْ زُحْزِحَ عَنِ النَّارِ وَأُدْخِلَ الْجَنَّةَ فَقَدْ فَازَ whoever is shifted away from the Fire and admitted to the Garden will have triumphed.

396

زُحْزِحَ zuhziḥa [pass. v.] moved away, shifted away (3:185) فَمَنْ زُحْزِحَ عَنِ النَّارِ وَأُدْخِلَ الْجَنَّةَ فَقَدْ فَازَ whoever is shifted away from the Fire and admitted to the Garden will have triumphed.

396
